_meta.description: Copy and labels for the Home page.

en.heroIntro: I am Alex Chen, a robotics Ph.D. student working on embodied AI systems that can perceive, plan, and recover reliably in the real world. This template is designed to help you present your research, publications, projects, and writing with minimal code edits.

highlights.title: At a Glance
highlights.focusValue: Embodied AI for reliable long-horizon robot tasks

zh.heroIntro: 我是陈明远，一名从事具身智能方向研究的机器人博士生，关注自主系统在真实环境中的感知、规划与恢复能力。这个模板旨在帮助你用尽量少的代码修改，快速搭建展示研究、论文、项目与写作内容的个人主页。

highlights.title: 工作速览
highlights.focusValue: 面向长时程任务的具身智能系统
